description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:jessie Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update, apt-get install -qq zim, and copies GitLabPagesTemplate.html to /usr/share/zim/templates/html/. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs ./build_zim.sh and triggers on any branch except the default branch. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs ./build_zim.sh, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and only runs on the default branch.
